title: centrosema capitatum
intro: Centrosema capitatum, also known as the sensitive plant or touch-me-not, is a type of leguminous vine native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural diuretic. Centrosema capitatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
